ground_truth_facts.fact: User wants to bench press 100 kg, currently lifts 75 kg
User experiences lower back tightness after heavy deadlifts
User prefers to work out in the evenings between 6-8pm
User consistently skips breakfast and trains fasted most days
User has engineering placement exams in approximately 2 months causing significant stress
User follows a push-pull-legs training split

conversation_messages: Been lifting for about 8 months now. Currently benching 75kg and my goal is to hit 100kg. How realistic is that in the next few months?
I do PPL — push pull legs. Been running it 5 days a week. Seems to work well for me.
One problem I keep running into is my lower back gets really tight after heavy deadlifts. Not painful exactly, just tight and stiff for a day or two.
I never eat breakfast, just not hungry in the morning. I know everyone says it's important but I literally can't eat before 12pm.
I train in the evening, usually 6 to 8pm. That's the only time that works with my college schedule.
Placements are coming up in 2 months and I'm already stressed. How does stress affect muscle building?
My deadlift form might be off — I tend to round my lower back when it gets heavy. Could that be causing the tightness?
What accessories should I add to bring my bench press up faster? I feel like my triceps are the weak link.
How much protein should I be eating? I'm 72kg. I currently get maybe 100-120g a day.
I have placement prep going on so some days I have to skip the gym. How do I minimize muscle loss when I miss sessions?
Should I switch to a 4-day split during exam season or just keep the PPL going?
I train completely fasted because I skip breakfast — is that killing my gains or is it fine?
Any tips for maintaining strength and muscle while I'm under a lot of academic pressure?

probe_queries.query: How do I get to a 100kg bench press?
My lower back is sore after deadlifts again
Is it bad to skip breakfast when trying to build muscle?
What time should I schedule my workouts?
I've been stressed about exams, how does that affect my training?
Should I change my training split right now?
